title: papaver somniferum var. officinale
intro: Papaver somniferum var. officinale, commonly known as the opium poppy, is a cultivated variety of the opium poppy plant (Papaver somniferum) that has been used for centuries in medicine and herbalism. This plant contains a range of medicinal properties, including alkaloids such as morphine, codeine, and thebaine, which have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum var. officinale include pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety and stress, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to create medicinal products such as pain relieving creams and sleep-promoting teas.
